rules: Use Outfit for all headings (H1-H6) with tracking-tight. NEVER use Inter for headings.
Use JetBrains Mono for all lottery numbers, percentages, and statistical data. It reinforces the 'Architect of Luck' AI vibe.
Use Manrope for body text and standard UI labels for maximum readability.
The app MUST default to Dark Mode to make the Sky Blue colors pop and feel futuristic.
Base dark is Midnight Void (#030712). Never use pure black.
Use 'Electric Sky Blue' (#0ea5e9) as the kinetic trigger for buttons and AI actions.
Use 'Crystal Glass' effect for floating headers: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10.

surfaces: Glassmorphism (Crystal Variant): Use for top sticky nav and AI prediction container overlay. High blur (backdrop-blur-xl) with slight white border.
The Tracing Beam: Use a subtle gradient border effect on the main AI Prediction card to indicate active processing.
Bento Grid: For the dashboard statistics view, use dense, varied grid spans.
visual enhancers.lottery_balls: Use pure CSS/Tailwind for 3D spheres: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-sky-300 to-sky-600 shadow-[inset_-4px_-4px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3),_4px_8px_16px_rgba(14,165,233,0.3)] flex items-center justify-center font-mono font-bold text-white text-xl.

component name.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for primary actions. Use glow on hover: hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(14,165,233,0.5)].
component name.cards: Subtle border (border-white/10), flat background (#0f172a). Use Shadcn Cards but remove heavy default styles.
component name.charts: Use Recharts (via Shadcn) for Hot/Cold numbers and frequency charts. Strip out grid lines for a cleaner, modern look. Use Sky Blue for chart bars/lines.
component name.navigation: Sticky top nav with Glassmorphism. Segmented control for UK Lotto vs EuroMillions selection.
component name.forms: Use Shadcn Input/Form components but styled with dark backgrounds and blue focus rings.

grids.bento_protocol: High density but asymmetrical. Example: AI Predictor spans col-span-full md:col-span-8, Hot/Cold Stats span col-span-4.

layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing: Dashboard cards MUST have p-6 or p-8 padding. No cramped text.
layouts.mobile: Mobile-first responsive grids. Stack stats in a single column on mobile. Ensure minimum 44x44px touch targets.
layouts.alignment: Left-align data tables and statistical forms. Center-align only the main AI Prediction generator outputs.

rules: Stagger entrance animations for lottery balls (e.g., delay 0.1s per ball) to create suspense when the AI predicts numbers.
Hover states on history table rows should subtly lift (-translate-y-[2px]) and highlight bg color.
Use framer-motion for smooth transitions between UK Lotto and EuroMillions dashboard views.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
Ensure sufficient contrast for sky blue text on dark backgrounds.
Support prefers-reduced-motion for the lottery ball animations.
Add aria-hidden='true' to purely decorative icons.

icons.rules: Use Phosphor Icons (Duotone or Regular) for a sophisticated tech look.

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing data fibers, used as an overlay behind the hero section or login page. Use with low opacity (e.g., 20%) to add texture.

ai_core_overlay.description: Computer generated circular object glowing. Use as a faded, masked background inside the AI Prediction card to give an 'AI Brain' vibe. Must not overpower the numbers.

3d libraries.recommendation: Use purely CSS/Tailwind (inset shadows, gradients) + framer-motion for the 3D lottery balls to maintain high performance. No heavy WebGL libraries (Three.js/R3F) needed for spheres.
3d libraries.charts_library: Use Recharts for the statistical analysis.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize a high-contrast dark theme to make the sky blue accents pop. It fits the 'AI Prediction' aesthetic perfectly.
The AI generator should look magical but mathematical.
Ensure all dashboard widgets stretch to fill the grid heights properly (no jagged bottoms).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not use transparent backgrounds without a blur/scrim for headers.
Do not center align the entire app container (.App { text-align: center }).
Create depth with layered elements and z-index hierarchy.
You MUST use the exact fonts specified, properly installed and applied via Tailwind config.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
